docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT. RANDY WALAND

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2024 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO JAN-08-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF YUN PENG, IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMSTERDAM HOSTEL, REPRESENTED BY RANDY WALAND IS PRESENT ON ZOOM. A MANDARIN INTERPERTER WAS NOT AVAILABLE TO ASSIST PLAINTIFF. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO 1/8/25 AT 1:30 P.M. TO ALLOW FOR A MANDARIN COURT INTERPERTER AND IS TO BE HEARD WITH ANOTHER CASE WITH THE SAME PARTIES. PLAINTIFF IS INSTRUCTED TO FILE HIS ZOOM REQUEST AND SUBMIT HIS EVIDENCE TO THE COURT AND DEFENDANT AHEAD OF THE NEXT HEARING. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED CASE FILED RETAINED IN THE COURTROOM TICKLER FILE. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM RANDY WALAND FILED BY DEFENDANT AMSTERDAM HOSTEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $100.00 SERVED SEP-17-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AMSTERDAM HOSTEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF YUN PENG AND DEFENDANT ARMSTERDAM HOSTEL. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2025 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY PENG, YUN AS TO DEFENDANT AMSTERDAM HOSTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENG, YUN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED AT THE WINDOW BY RANDY WALAND.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENG, YUN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMSTERDAM HOSTEL DEFENDANT'S BEHAVIOR WAS NOT AN ASSAULT AND PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE HE SUFFERED EMOTIONAL DISTRESS OR ANXIETY DUE TO THE INCIDENT. HIS MEDICAL RECORD WAS DATED BEFORE THE INCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
